items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL AS100 OBD-II autódiagnosztika:The ANCEL AS100 OBD-II Diagnostic Unit is a compact and easy-to-use scanner for quick identification of engine problems and checking vehicle emission readiness. It offers a clear display of error codes, live data and vehicle information, making it the ideal tool for both the everyday driver and more advanced home users. It is compatible with a wide range of OBD2/EOBD compliant cars, including European cars since 2003 and American and Australian cars since 1996. Thanks to its simple operation and fast diagnostics, the AS100 is a practical assistant for everyday car maintenance. The scanner allows you to read and delete fault codes, monitor live engine parameters, determine readiness for emissions tests and check the function of individual sensors. Úzká slim verze je designovaná tak, aby byla co nejtenčí a neměla tak vliv na zvýšení hmotnosti a objemu objektivu.
